miumaupiupau.config.title: MiuMauPiuPau
miumaupiupau.config.prefix.description:
When starting message with this prefix the message will be miumau'd

Pro tip: set this to empty and all your messages will be miumau'd
miumaupiupau.config.chance.description: Chance of random miumau appearing in your chat message after each word
miumaupiupau.config.duplicate_words.desc: Allow duplicate miumaus on the same message
miumaupiupau.config.commandwhitelist.des: Regex patterns of commands that get miumau'd if argument after the pattern match starts with the message prefix
miumaupiupau.config.words.description: All your miumaus! Random ones will be selected from this list
